zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwladus Ferch Hopkin於1302年出生時，她的父親Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan22歲，母親Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel19歲。她於1330年與Robert Hopkin Rayne在威爾士結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1402年在英國威爾斯享年101歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwladus Ferch Hopkin于1302年出生时，她的父亲Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan22岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel19岁。她于1330年与Robert Hopkin Rayne在威尔士结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1402年在英国威尔斯享年101岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hopkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh (southern): from a pet form of the personal name Hobb, a pet form of Robert (see Hobbs ).

variants.name: Robert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Gilles, Normand, Armand, Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Michel, Edouard, Gaston, Yves.

French, Walloon, English, German, Dutch, Flemish, and Breton (of French origin); Hungarian (Róbert): from the ancient Germanic personal name Ro(d)bert (Middle English Robert, Old French Ro(d)bert), composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This is found occasionally in Anglo-Saxon England before the Conquest, but in the main it was introduced into England by the Normans and quickly became popular among all classes of society. Pet forms and diminutives are found from an early date, Robin being particularly common. Compare Robair , Robar , Robare , and Rober .
In some cases also an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Hopkinson
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Hobkin (see Hopkin ) + -son.

variants.name: Hopkins
meanings: English and Welsh (Glamorgan): variant of Hopkin with genitival or excrescent -s. In Ireland, where the name is also frequent, it is sometimes Gaelicized as Mac Oibicín.
History: Stephen Hopkins (c. 1580–1644) was a pilgrim on the Mayflower in 1620 and one of the founders of Plymouth Colony. At his death he left seven children and eighteen grandchildren.

nameMeanings.name: Gwladus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old form of   Gladys  , of uncertain derivation.

variants.name: Gwladys
meanings: Old form of   Gladys  , of uncertain derivation.

nameMeanings.name: Ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwladus Ferch Hopkin was born in 1302, her father, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, was 22 and her mother, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, was 19. She married Robert Hopkin Rayne in 1330, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1402, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 101, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwladus Ferch Hopkin est née en 1302, son père, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Hopkin Rayne en 1330, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1402, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 101 ans, et a été enterrée à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwladus Ferch Hopkin 1302 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan 22 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel 19. Sie hat 1330 in Wales Robert Hopkin Rayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1402 im Alter von 101 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladus Ferch Hopkin è nata il nel 1302, sua padre, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Robert Hopkin Rayne nel 1330, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1402, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 101 anni, e fu sepolta a Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwladus Ferch Hopkinが1302年に生まれた時，父Hopkin ap Hywel Fychanは22歳，母Gwenllian verch Rhys Foelは19歳であった。1330年にウェールズでRobert Hopkin Rayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1402年にイギリスウェールズで101歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwladus Ferch Hopkin(이)가 1302년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1330년 웨일스에서 Robert Hopkin Rayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1402년 영국 웨일스에서 101세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladus Ferch Hopkin nasceu em 1302, seu pai, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Hopkin Rayne em 1330, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1402, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 101 anos, e foi sepultada em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwladus Ferch Hopkin родилась в 1302 г., её отцу по имени Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Hopkin Rayne в 1330 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1402 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 101 год и была похоронена в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwladus Ferch Hopkin nació en 1302, su papá, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Robert Hopkin Rayne en 1330, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1402, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 101 años, y fue sepultada en Gales, Reino Unido.
